subparts.text: Discuss various flows involved in a supply chain.
Compare and contrast characteristics of good and services.
Explain difference between insourcing and outsourcing.
What do understand by form and functional designs?

Monthly demand data over 6 months for a fast-selling model of a TV is as under. Determine the forecast for 7th months using 3 months moving average and weighted moving average methods. Weights give for demand for 6th, 5th and 4th months are 0.5,0.3 and 0.2 respectively. Month 1 2 3 4 5 6 Demand 130 120 140 110 125 130 Comment on weight selection for weighted moving method.
Discuss transformation approach to explain operations management. Explain various types of transformations with suitable examples.
Discuss continuous and intermittent production systems with suitable examples.
Elucidate concept of inventory in functioning of an organization. What do you understand by EOQ? Discuss simple EOQ model of inventory management.
What do you mean by product design? What are features of a good design?
What is a process? Discuss very briefly various factors considered to select an appropriate process.
